examples: As one herder says, "I do not buy sugar because it is expensive." We do not use vegetables.
A herder serenades his goats near Jerusalem, a few miles from where David tended his herds.
The reindeer herder who discovered Lyuba sold her for two snowmobiles and a year's supply of food.
The virus puts the Windows machine under the control of a botnet herder.
In addition to these, the nomadic lifestyle of herder families makes the children, particularly the boys, drop out of school to assist the family.
